message:
test: add conformance oracle tests for subqueries, round, and aggregation

New test coverage:
- test_conformance_implicit_agg_and_round: implicit aggregation (no GROUP
  BY), round() edge cases at midpoints, mixed aggregate+scalar GROUP BY
- test_conformance_subquery_expressions: EXISTS, NOT EXISTS, IN subquery,
  scalar subquery in WHERE, CASE with subquery, COALESCE with subquery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
